_note: Several generators stamp `fetchedAt` into their data JSON on every run. run_syncs.sh treats a diff as real only if it has lines beyond `ignoreDiffPattern`, and reverts timestamp-only output so it is never committed.

syncs.label: ui-component-tables
syncs.title: @expo/ui component tables
syncs.note: Idempotent, marker-fenced, no timestamp. Runs `pnpm format` over the repo at the end, so it is listed first to run on a clean tree.
